keyRequiredError: Configure a model in Settings (⚙, bottom-left) to ask a question.
intro: Ask in natural language and the AI picks and runs a <0>verified tool</0>, returning a <2>grounded answer</2> based on <1>ingested data</1>, with <3>citations</3> and the <4>source (provenance)</4>. Numbers and citations are generated by a <5>verified tool (a fixed query)</5>, so they are reproducible (the AI only selects the tool). <6>Asking a question requires an API key.</6>
inputPlaceholder: e.g. Which thermoelectric material has the highest ZT?

key.label: Anthropic API key
key.note: A key is needed because the AI is used to understand the question (which verified tool to use). Numbers and citations are generated by a <0>verified tool</0>, so they are reproducible (the AI only selects the tool). The key is kept only within this tab and is never saved (shared with the workbench and tools). If you want to <1>run a tool deterministically without a key</1>, use the "Tools" tab on the dataset detail in the catalog.

headNote.verified: Human-verified deterministic tools · fixed query · reproducible citations
headNote.unverified: AI-generated query · unverified (you can check it in the SPARQL below)

sparql.hint: These are the read-only queries this answer ran (verified tools use a fixed template; the escape is AI-generated).
